name: Neko
description: A self-hosted virtual browser powered by WebRTC
compose:
name: slashnode-neko
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/m1k1o/neko/firefox:3.1.4
    container_name: neko
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      NEKO_DESKTOP_SCREEN: 1920x1080@30
      NEKO_MEMBER_MULTIUSER_USER_PASSWORD: neko
      NEKO_MEMBER_MULTIUSER_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      NEKO_WEBRTC_EPR: 52000-52100
      NEKO_WEBRTC_ICELITE: '0'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3880:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
